items.summary: Some Marriott hotels allow you to add points or cash to a free-night award to secure an upgraded room. items.title: American Airlines Gives Agents A Script To Defend Renaming West Palm Beach Airport For Donald Trump
items.summary: American Airlines is giving employees talking points to explain West Palm Beach airport’s Trump rename, pointing to Florida law and IATA guidance. Gate screens already display the presidential name, while the airport code officially changes from PBI to DJT on August 18.
